markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on performance data and align on the new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sign-up data is skewed by a new "no-trial" strategy.** This shift to paid-only sign-ups is a deliberate trade-off for higher-quality, higher-ARPU users and reduced fraud.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Content strategy is shifting to high-quality, experience-driven articles.** This move is driven by Google's core update and will prioritize depth over the previous volume goal of 30 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**A major product pivot to an AI agent orchestration platform is coming in \~6 weeks.** This will create a large content opportunity for deep technical tutorials and use-case guides.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Sanity will be cleaned up and tagged.** This will enable granular PostHog reporting on content performance by funnel stage, product, and intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategy Shift

  - [**Problem:** Content traffic and engagement are up, but sign-up conversions remain low.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Cause:** A strategic shift to a "no-trial" sign-up process in early December.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Attracts higher-quality, higher-ARPU users and reduces fraud.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Impact:** Sign-up volume is down, but early data shows the change primarily filters out "tire kickers" without affecting the core buyer persona.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will update all CTAs to remove "free trial" mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**New Direction:** Prioritize quality over volume.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Align with Google's core update and the new high-quality lead strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [**Format:** Focus on anecdotal, experience-driven articles with rich media (screenshots, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
    1.  [**Code Review Product:** High-priority due to strong self-serve and sales-led traction.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
    2.  [**Bottom-of-Funnel Content:** Continue iterating on tool comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
    3.  [**Top-Performing Articles:** Enrich and update evergreen content.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Volume:** Weekly output will likely drop from 30 to \~15 articles as quality standards rise.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Product & Content Infrastructure

  - [**Website Redesign:** A new, product-focused website will launch Monday, Jan 12, after internal QA.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [**Sanity Cleanup:**](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current Sanity setup is broken, with two conflicting studio versions.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will investigate and resolve the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Sanity Tagging for PostHog:**](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable granular performance reporting in PostHog.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Method:** Add tags to Sanity for:](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [Product (e.g., Code Review)](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [Funnel Stage (e.g., Top of Funnel)](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [Intent (e.g., AI code review keyword)](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Allows slicing data (e.g., "conversion rate for top-of-funnel content for the Code Review product") without manual URL lists.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Auggie CLI:** Deprioritized. The product team is exploring a new "plugin" concept that may make the CLI obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Future Product Pivot: AI Agent Platform

  - [**Strategic Direction:** A major pivot to an AI agent orchestration platform, similar to LangChain but focused on software agent development.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [**Product:** An SDK and APIs for building, customizing, and deploying agents for tasks like incident management, security reviews, and automated documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Content Opportunity:** A large volume of deep technical tutorials and use-case guides.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The pivot is \~6 weeks out. GrowthX will need a 2–3 week runway to build the content pipeline and standards once the launch date is set.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sylvain:** Share staging link for the new website redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Update all content CTAs to remove "free trial" mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Investigate and resolve the conflicting Sanity studio versions.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Develop a tagging schema for Sanity to enable granular PostHog reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Prioritize content for the Code Review product.](https://fathom.video/share/CScnLwKbrFGxeFUW9k3Zdqc8JaV9nS33?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
